reviews.comment:
La atención es muy buena en general,  pero quisiéramos destacar el trabajo del playero Alejandro G. Quien nos atendió el otro día, super amable, educado,  y hasta ahora el mejor en la limpieza del parabrisas, se ganó su propina!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service is very good overall, but we'd like to highlight the work of the attendant Alejandro G., who served us the other day. He was super friendly, polite, and so far the best at cleaning windshields—he definitely earned his tip!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxdExPdHp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
medio pelo, los baños faltan mantención, y la máquina para calibrar de Aires las ruedas no funcionan las dos que están colocadas, ayer pasé y ya hace varios días está así funcionar. Pero los precios siempre más que al día.

(Translated by Google)
It's mediocre, the bathrooms need maintenance, and the air conditioning unit doesn't work—both of the wheels are broken. I passed by yesterday, and it's been like that for several days now. But the prices are always more than up-to-date.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxMXB1SnRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Gran cantidad de surtidores para una atención rápida. Toilettes impecables, al igual que el shop

(Translated by Google)
Plenty of pumps for quick service. Spotless restrooms, as well as the shop.
